description: Precision timing and fashionable style make a wonderful combination in this watch from esprit. This range of watches perfectly capture the ESPRIT eye for perfection and are great for urban wear - transitioning perfectly from day to night. Case diameter: 25 mmCase thickness: 6 mmDial shape: RectangleWarranty: Two YearsStainless steel case with crystal embellishmentTextured black leather strap with tang claspBlack dial with white and silver hands and hour marksLogo on the dialScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant
